text:
A couple of generous knobs of butter
4 large shallots, peeled and finely chopped
4 garlic cloves, peeled and crushed
200ml cider
200ml beef stock
60-80g tomato ketchup
60-80g hp sauce or oxford sauce
1/2 tbsp tewkesbury mustard
1 tbsp clear honey
1 small chilli, finely chopped
4 tbsp tomato puree
40ml henderson's relish or worcestershire sauce
